description: This chapter covers SLADIN® combined sweeteners by Green Lines Company, featuring their characteristics, quality control, and applications. SLADIN® products leverage taste synergy effects and undergo rigorous testing. The chapter presents three product lines: Premium Sweetener Solutions offering enhanced functionality and award-winning taste, Aspartame-Free Formulations for alternative sweetening needs, and Classic Sweetener Blends with aspartame for reliable performance. All products are ISO 9001 and ISO 22000 certified, with custom formulations available for specific client requirements. The file also includes premium natural syrups.

sweeteners_no_aspartame.description: SLADIN® aspartame-free sweeteners (№50 S, №200 K, №130, №200 AN, №240, №200 KN, №250 L) This section details SLADIN® aspartame-free sweeteners designed for various beverage applications. These products feature sweetness levels 50-250 times higher than sugar, with excellent stability during pasteurization and hot filling processes. They provide a sugar-like taste profile without requiring phenylalanine labeling. The formulations ensure production cost efficiency, thermal processing stability, and incorporate anti-caking components for improved handling and transportation. Notably, the 250 L sweetener in this group contains cyclamate and saccharin. Все товары имеют дозировку (ИСПОЛЬЗОВАТЬ ДОЗИРОВКУ: 48 кг/т + 0,7 кг/т 50 S СЛАДИН® = по сладости 100 кг/т сахара,).

Заметки: Основное отличие между `ПОДСЛАСТИТЕЛЬ КОМБИНИРОВАННЫЙ 200 K` и `ПОДСЛАСТИТЕЛЬ КОМБИНИРОВАННЫЙ 200 A` заключается в их составе: 200 K содержит подсластители (Е952, Е954), тогда как 200 A имеет более широкий состав подсластителей (Е950, Е951, Е952, Е954) и явно указывает на содержание источника фенилаланина (что связано с наличием аспартама Е951), в отличие от 200 К, где такое указание отсутствует.

sweeteners_with_aspartame.description: This section presents SLADIN® combined sweeteners containing aspartame, which require phenylalanine content labeling. These products feature high sweetness coefficients and broad application across various flavored beverages. The next-generation formulations offer enhanced taste characteristics while ensuring cost efficiency. The product range includes innovative solutions such as №250 LA, №200 A, №200 AC, №200 L, and №280 B, each designed to meet specific beverage application requirements. Все товары имеют дозировку (ИСПОЛЬЗОВАТЬ ДОЗИРОВКУ: 48 кг/т + 0,7 кг/т 50 S СЛАДИН® = по сладости 100 кг/т сахара,).

sweeteners_premium.description: This section examines SLADIN® premium sweetening solutions that combine superior taste with functional benefits. The premium line includes Combined Sweetener 20, the prebiotic syrup 'FOS 55L Sweet Opti' PREBIOSE®, and natural syrups 'LUX-15', 'LUX-8' (preservative-free version), and 'LUX-8' (with preservatives). These products are formulated to enhance both the sensory qualities and nutritional profile of final applications, featuring clean label ingredients and specialized functional properties for premium beverage and food products. Все товары имеют дозировку (ИСПОЛЬЗОВАТЬ ДОЗИРОВКУ: 48 кг/т + 0,7 кг/т 50 S СЛАДИН® = по сладости 100 кг/т сахара,).
